title: Canada Apprentice Loan online service account in MSCA - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Apprentice Loan online service account in MSCA
You can now access your Canada Apprentice Loan online service  account from My Service Canada Account (MSCA). You can apply for a Canada Apprentice  Loan, manage your loan, and much more.
To access your Canada Apprentice Loan online service account,  you must first register or sign in to MSCA. This new process will provide a  real-time identity verification and enhanced security measures to help protect  your personal information.
Before applying for the Canada Apprentice Loan, make sure that you meet all eligibility  criteria. For more information, visit the Canada Apprentice Loan home page .
To access your Canada Apprentice Loan online service account:
- register or sign in to MSCA
- go to the Canada Apprentice Loan section on your dashboard
Register or Sign in to MSCA

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
